evals.prompt: How do I create and send an email campaign in Mailchimp?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on email campaign creation workflow

assertions.name: mentions_drag_and_drop_editor
assertions.description: Mentions drag-and-drop editor for designing emails

assertions.name: mentions_audience_selection
assertions.description: Mentions audience or list selection for targeting recipients

assertions.name: mentions_ab_testing
assertions.description: Mentions A/B testing or subject line testing capabilities

evals.prompt: I want to set up an automated welcome series in Mailchimp for new subscribers
evals.expected_output: Guidance on Customer Journey Builder automation setup

assertions.name: mentions_customer_journey_builder
assertions.description: Mentions Customer Journey Builder or automation workflow

assertions.name: mentions_signup_trigger
assertions.description: Mentions trigger such as signup or subscribe event

assertions.name: mentions_standard_plan
assertions.description: Mentions Standard plan requirement for full journey builder features

evals.prompt: How do I use the Mailchimp API to add contacts to an audience?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on Marketing API for member management

assertions.name: mentions_members_endpoint
assertions.description: Mentions POST to /lists/{list_id}/members endpoint or PUT for upsert

assertions.name: mentions_api_key_auth
assertions.description: Mentions API key authentication via Basic Auth or Bearer token

assertions.name: mentions_data_center_or_hash
assertions.description: Mentions data center in base URL or subscriber_hash as MD5 of email
